function.name: add_days
function.description: Add N days to a given date.
function.long_description: Parses an input date and returns the resulting date after adding a specified number of days.
example_user_queries: Calculate a new date by adding 90 days to 2023-01-01.
Call add_days with date 15/03/2026, n 10, date_format %d/%m/%Y.
Get the resulting date after adding 3 days to 2026-07-04.
If I add 365 days to 2020-02-29, what is the result?
